history.en: Ancient herding breed developed in the Catalan Pyrenees for managing sheep and goats. Used as messengers and sentinels during Spanish Civil War. Nearly extinct afterward but restored through dedicated breeding programs in the 1970s.
history.zh: 在加泰罗尼亚比利牛斯山脉培育的古老牧羊犬种，用于管理绵羊和山羊。在西班牙内战期间被用作信使和哨兵。战后几乎灭绝，但通过20世纪70年代的专门育种计划得以恢复。

overview.en: The Catalan Sheepdog is a highly intelligent, loyal, and energetic herding breed from Catalonia, Spain. Known for its protective and courageous nature, this medium-sized dog forms deep bonds with its family and is naturally wary of strangers, making it an excellent guardian. Its thick, long coat and alert expression reflect its ancient heritage as a shepherd in the Pyrenees. While affectionate with loved ones, it requires consistent leadership and mental stimulation to prevent boredom. This breed is not for first-time owners; it thrives with experienced handlers who can channel its herding instincts and high energy into productive activities. Its history as a war messenger and sentinel during the Spanish Civil War underscores its bravery and trainability. Today, it remains a devoted companion and working dog, excelling in agility, obedience, and herding trials.
overview.zh: 加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬是一种来自西班牙加泰罗尼亚的高智商、忠诚且精力充沛的牧羊犬。它以保护性强、勇敢无畏而闻名，体型中等，与家人建立深厚情感，对陌生人天然警惕，是出色的护卫犬。其浓密的长毛和机警的外表反映了它在比利牛斯山脉作为牧羊犬的古老传承。虽然对家人充满感情，但它需要坚定的领导和充足的精神刺激，否则容易无聊。这个品种不适合新手主人，它更适合有经验的人士，能够引导其牧羊本能和高能量投入有益活动。它在西班牙内战期间担任信使和哨兵的历史，彰显了它的勇敢和可训练性。如今，它依然是忠诚的伴侣犬和工作犬，在敏捷、服从和牧羊比赛中表现出色。

care.en: Daily care for the Catalan Sheepdog requires significant commitment. Its thick, double coat needs brushing at least three times a week to prevent mats, and daily brushing during shedding seasons. Bathing should be infrequent to preserve natural oils. Exercise is crucial: this breed needs at least 60–90 minutes of vigorous activity daily, including long walks, runs, or herding games. Without adequate exercise, it may become destructive or bark excessively. Regular vet check-ups are essential to monitor for hip dysplasia, eye issues, and skin allergies common in the breed. Nail trimming, ear cleaning, and dental care should be part of the weekly routine. Mental stimulation through puzzle toys or training sessions is equally important to keep this clever dog content.
care.zh: 加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬的日常护理需要大量投入。其浓密的双层被毛每周至少需要刷毛三次，换毛季节则需每日梳理，以防止打结。洗澡不宜频繁，以免破坏天然油脂。运动至关重要：该品种每天需要至少60到90分钟的高强度活动，包括长距离散步、跑步或牧羊游戏。如果运动不足，它可能变得具有破坏性或过度吠叫。定期兽医检查必不可少，以监测该品种常见的髋关节发育不良、眼部问题和皮肤过敏。每周还应进行指甲修剪、耳朵清洁和牙齿护理。通过益智玩具或训练课程提供精神刺激，同样能让这只聪明的狗保持满足。

training.en: Training a Catalan Sheepdog requires patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement. This breed is highly intelligent and eager to please but can be independent and stubborn. Early socialization is critical to prevent excessive wariness or reactivity toward strangers and other animals. Use reward-based methods such as treats, praise, and play; harsh corrections can damage trust and cause fearfulness. Start obedience basics as a puppy, and advance to herding, agility, or scent work to satisfy its working drive. Short, varied sessions of 10–15 minutes work best to maintain focus. Because of its history as a messenger, it responds well to clear, distinct commands. Incorporate mental challenges like hide-and-seek or problem-solving games. A well-trained Catalan Sheepdog is a reliable and joyful partner, but training must be ongoing throughout its life.
training.zh: 训练加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬需要耐心、一致性和积极强化。这个品种非常聪明且渴望取悦，但可能独立且固执。早期社会化至关重要，以防止对陌生人和动物过度警惕或反应激烈。使用基于奖励的方法，如零食、赞美和游戏；严厉的纠正会破坏信任并导致恐惧。从幼犬期开始基础服从训练，然后进阶到牧羊、敏捷或嗅觉工作，以满足其工作驱动力。短而多样的训练课程（每次10到15分钟）最能保持其注意力。由于其作为信使的历史，它对清晰明确的指令反应良好。加入躲猫猫或解谜游戏等精神挑战。一只训练有素的加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬是可靠而快乐的伙伴，但训练需要贯穿其一生。

diet.en: The Catalan Sheepdog benefits from a high-quality diet formulated for active, medium-to-large breeds. Its meals should be rich in animal protein to support muscle maintenance and energy, with moderate healthy fats for coat and skin health. Feed two measured meals per day rather than free-feeding to prevent obesity, as this breed can gain weight if under-exercised. Look for foods containing omega-3 fatty acids (from fish oil or flaxseed) to reduce inflammation and support joint health, especially given its predisposition to hip dysplasia. Avoid fillers like corn and soy; opt for whole grains or grain-free options as needed. Fresh water must always be available. Treats should be limited to training rewards. Consult your vet for specific portion sizes based on age, weight, and activity level. Puppies need a growth-formula diet until about 12 months.
diet.zh: 加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬适合食用为活跃的中大型犬配制的高品质狗粮。其餐食应富含动物蛋白以维持肌肉和能量，适量健康脂肪以维护皮毛健康。每日分两次定量喂食，而非自由采食，以防肥胖——因为如果运动不足，该品种容易发胖。选择含有Omega-3脂肪酸（来自鱼油或亚麻籽）的食物，以减少炎症并支持关节健康，特别是考虑到其易患髋关节发育不良。避免玉米和大豆等填充物；根据需要选择全谷物或无谷物配方。必须随时提供新鲜饮水。零食应仅限于训练奖励。请咨询兽医，根据年龄、体重和活动水平确定具体份量。幼犬在12个月大前需要食用成长配方狗粮。

livingTips.en: The Catalan Sheepdog is best suited to a home with a securely fenced yard where it can run and play. While it can adapt to apartment living if given ample daily exercise, it is generally not ideal for small spaces due to its high energy and barking tendency. It thrives in rural or suburban settings with room to roam. This breed is excellent with children it is raised with, but its herding instinct may lead it to nip at heels; teach children how to interact respectfully. It can be dominant with other dogs of the same sex, so early socialization is key. It may chase cats or small pets unless raised with them. As a guardian, it will bark to alert, so noise-sensitive neighbors may be an issue. Provide plenty of interactive toys and a comfortable indoor space; this breed is loyal and prefers to be near its family.
livingTips.zh: 加泰罗尼亚牧羊犬最适合拥有安全围栏院子的家庭，以便它能奔跑玩耍。虽然如果每天给予充足运动，它也能适应公寓生活，但由于其高能量和爱吠叫的特点，通常不适合小空间。它在乡村或郊区环境中茁壮成长，有足够的活动空间。这个品种与一起长大的孩子相处很好，但其牧羊本能可能导致它轻咬脚跟；应教导孩子如何尊重地与它互动。它对同性别其他狗可能有支配欲，因此早期社会化是关键。除非从小一起养大，它可能会追逐猫或小宠物。作为护卫犬，它会吠叫示警，因此对噪音敏感的邻居可能是个问题。提供大量互动玩具和舒适的室内空间；这个品种忠诚，喜欢待在家人身边。
